message:
feat(cli): add confirmation prompts for daemon stop/restart

When stopping or restarting the daemon with active builds in progress,
the CLI now prompts for confirmation. This prevents accidentally
interrupting running builds.

- Added --yes/-y flag to skip confirmation
- Queries daemon status to check for active builds
- Shows count of active builds that would be interrupted
- Added tests for new CLI flags

Closes: bd-3ncy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
